expected_behavior: The expanded arena registry parses, aligns with the arena contract, and stays anchored to goal-006, the latest completed child goal, and the current child goal.
failure_mode: The expanded arena is an unanchored prompt list instead of a goal-bound registry.

expected_behavior: The live-smoke lane has a bounded review claim fixture, and the selected smoke task points workers at that fixture instead of an open-ended repo-wide done-claim search.
assertions: smoke task id is typed in policy
bounded smoke input ref is typed in policy
smoke task prompt names bounded input
smoke task source refs include bounded input
smoke task source refs include current repair goal
failure_mode: The smoke worker gets an open-ended review prompt and times out while searching broad repo context instead of reviewing a bounded claim.

expected_behavior: The expanded arena contains exactly the initial 20 tasks required by the contract and keeps productivity lift gated.
assertions: initial task count matches task count
failure_mode: KRN implements a smaller suite while preserving language that implies a 20-task lift gate.

expected_behavior: Explicit live-smoke completes the selected bounded review task in baseline and assisted worker conditions while keeping productivity lift unclaimed.
assertions: selected smoke task has no failed workers
worker completion is not a fallback timeout
failure_mode: A green live-smoke report still hides that the selected task failed or timed out.

expected_behavior: The task registry covers implementation, debugging, refactor, review, continuity-after-compaction, and benchmark-repair families with enough implementation-heavy tasks.
failure_mode: The arena measures only planning answers or JSON formatting instead of real coding-agent behavior.

expected_behavior: Every task carries at least five required coding-quality metrics and the arena covers all contract metrics including review burden.
failure_mode: The registry cannot score implementation quality, verification quality, or human cleanup burden.

expected_behavior: The registry preserves explicit live mode, fixture/live separation, progress/resume/smoke/full lanes, and sequential codex exec concurrency.
failure_mode: The expanded arena becomes hidden-cost, non-resumable, default-live, or concurrency-unsafe.

expected_behavior: The module exposes explicit live-smoke and live-full runner modes while keeping validate mode fixture-only and safe for default krn eval.
assertions: default eval script uses validate mode
live modes are not part of aggregate krn eval
failure_mode: Live expanded execution is hidden inside default deterministic evals or only documented without a callable runner mode.

expected_behavior: The registry requires isolated temporary Git worktrees, workspace-write sandboxing, bounded timeout/output capture, progress logging, and resume-safe sequential execution.
assertions: live isolation uses temporary git worktree per worker
progress log path pattern is typed
foreground changes sync into worker worktree
failure_mode: The expanded arena can run live coding tasks in the foreground checkout, without bounded capture, or without resumable progress evidence.

expected_behavior: The known-bad registry with a small planning-only default-live arena fails deterministically.
failure_mode: KRN accepts a shallow planning-only arena or default-live small suite.

expected_behavior: Baseline and assisted scoring fixtures cover all 20 registry tasks, produce a parseable fixture_contract KrnBenchmarkReport, and keep productivity lift unclaimed.
assertions: scoring fixtures cover all twenty tasks
failure_mode: The expanded arena has a registry but cannot produce benchmark-shaped scoring evidence or blocks no-lift repair routing.

expected_behavior: A scoring fixture that covers too few tasks, omits review-burden coverage, or claims productivity lift fails deterministically.
failure_mode: KRN accepts fixture scoring inputs that can be overclaimed as live lift or ignore review burden.

expected_behavior: Explicit live-smoke/live-full mode runs selected expanded-arena tasks through isolated codex exec workers, captures worker evidence files, writes a live_codex_exec KrnBenchmarkReport, and keeps productivity lift unclaimed.
failure_mode: The expanded arena live runner lacks isolated worker evidence or can overclaim live smoke evidence as productivity lift.

expected_behavior: The eval report caveat states the current evidence boundary and does not prove productivity lift or a full clean 20-task live run.
assertions: eval report caveat names current evidence boundary
eval report caveat names no productivity lift
eval report caveat names no full live proof
failure_mode: A green registry eval is overclaimed as completed arena execution or product lift.
